title: EcoBag - 20 Pack Refuse Sacks - 100L - 22 Microns - Heavy Duty, Leak Resistant Recyclable Bin Bags, Eco-Friendly, Durable Waste Disposal Bags for Household & Commercial Use (736 x 965mm)
features: Heavy Duty and Durable: These bin bags are crafted to handle even the heaviest loads, ensuring they won't tear or puncture easily. Our strong bin liners are ideal for managing all types of rubbish, from household waste to commercial trash.

Eco-Friendly and Sustainable: Made entirely from recycled materials, these refuse sacks are 100% recyclable, promoting a circular economy and reducing your carbon footprint. By choosing these recycling bags, you're making a sustainable choice for the planet.

Generous 100L Capacity: With dimensions of 736 x 935mm, these garbage bags are designed to fit 100L bins perfectly. Their large capacity makes them suitable for a wide range of applications, providing a reliable solution for your waste management needs.

Clear Plastic Design: The transparent nature of these trash bags allows for easy identification of contents, making them ideal for recycling purposes. Whether used in a kitchen, office, or catering environment, these clear plastic bags offer practicality and convenience.

Convenient Pack of 20: Includes 20 heavy-duty refuse sacks, ensuring you have a sufficient supply for continuous use. This bulk packaging provides great value and convenience, making these bin bags an economical and eco-friendly choice.
description: From the manufacturer 20 Clear Recycling Refuse Sacks 100L Ecobag clear recycling refuse sack is a standard refuse size bag that is made from 100% recycled plastic. This product is perfect for recycling use as the contents inside are visible. *FOR AUTHENTICITY PLEASE PURCHASE VIA 'DISPATCHED BY AMAZON'* Size 736mm x 990mm (100litre) refuse sack. I Used To Be Rubbish These bags are made from 100% recycled plastic & are 100% recyclable. Doing Our Bit To Help Because we make these bags from recycled plastics, We are doing our bit help to prevent some plastic going to landfill sites.
